pairs.question: Who is Agustín Díaz and what sailing classes has he competed in?
pairs.answer: Agustín Díaz, known as Augie Diaz, is an American sailor born on June 6, 1954. He is a world-class competitor in the Snipe, Star, and Laser sailing classes.

pairs.question: What notable achievements did Augie Diaz have in college sailing?
pairs.answer: Augie Diaz sailed for Tulane University, where he was named All American on the Tulane Green Wave sailing team in 1973, 1974, and 1975. He won the ICSA Coed Dinghy National Championship in 1973, the ICSA Men's Singlehanded National Championship in 1974, and led the team to win the Leonard M. Fowle Trophy in 1974. He was also elected ICSA College Sailor of the Year in 1974.

pairs.question: In which years did Augie Diaz win the US Sailor of the Year Award and what other major recognition did he receive?
pairs.answer: Augie Diaz received the US Sailor of the Year Award in 2003 and was inducted into the National Sailing Hall of Fame in 2021.

pairs.question: Write a Python function that checks if Augie Diaz won a Snipe world championship in a given year.
pairs.answer:
python
def is_snipe_world_champion(year):
    snipe_world_champion_years = [2003, 2005]
    return year in snipe_world_champion_years

This function returns `True` if the input year is 2003 or 2005, as these are the years Augie Diaz won the Snipe world championship.

pairs.question: What are some of the Snipe class titles Augie Diaz has won besides the world championship?
pairs.answer: Besides the Snipe world championship, Augie Diaz has won the Snipe world masters championship in 2002, 2004, 2006, and 2012; Western Hemisphere & Orient champion in 1972, 2002, and 2021; North American champion in 1974, 2004, 2006, 2007, 2008, and 2013; and U.S. National champion in 1974, 1980, 2001, 2002, 2006, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2018, and 2025.

pairs.question: How many Pan American Games medals has Augie Diaz won in the Snipe class, and in which years?
pairs.answer: Augie Diaz has won three Pan American Games medals in the Snipe class: silver medals in 1971 and 2011, and a bronze medal in 2015.

pairs.question: What sailing classes did Augie Diaz start with as a child, and at what age did he begin sailing?
pairs.answer: Augie Diaz began sailing Optimists at the age of eight in Clearwater, Florida.
